text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the first day of the year, and for some
reason...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#NewYearsSunrise #SharingIsCaring
#NewYearSameCuteCurrenChan"
...Hehe. It sure is beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're watching the first sunrise of the year from a
mountain peak.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take a pic for me! Hm... I think I'll pretend I'm
holding up the sun. As for you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take a pic for me! Hm... I think I'll pretend I'm
holding up the sun. As for you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll spoil me lots this year too!
choice_data_list: Why are we on a mountain?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll spoil me lots this year too!
choice_data_list: Why are we on a mountain?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Because it's the perfect place to get a great pic of
the year's first sunrise, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've already gotten some beauts, so I'd say the
year's off to a great start! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Plus... I've gotten some energy from the sun!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! I need to make sure I'm charged up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're about to decide what path I should take,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I think... I really do want the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But do I have what it takes? I guess we'll find out
soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fillies' Revue will be the race that decides her
path, and it comes up right after the New Year's
holiday. She seems particularly motivated to take
on this race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I really wanna do whatever I can to win it. After
all...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: A tiara would look great on me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's picked a really tough path considering her
motive, but I do want to encourage her to pursue
her goals.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Welp! Now that the sun's up, it's time to go back
down the mountain.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm free after this... Is there anything I can do
today to help me get that tiara?
choice_data_list:
You need to get your speed up as much as
possible!

You should get some rest and enjoy the
holidays.
You need to shine every way you can.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Awww, you make it sound so easy! Is that really
all I need to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything that can get her the win, it's
her speed. I tell her she should hone the skills she
has.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hone my skills, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, got it! I'll be faster than anyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got an idea! Race me down the mountain!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Let's see who can get to the bottom of the
mountain faster!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Let's see who can get to the bottom of the
mountain faster!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
With you chasing me, I'll be super motivated!
Smart, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
With you chasing me, I'll be super motivated!
Smart, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure you don't get hurt. I'll think about
the conditions for winning or losing while we're
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could ever win against Curren
Chan. She's an Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ready, set, go!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Catch up, slowpoke! Oh! Watch your step here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Catch up, slowpoke! Oh! Watch your step here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, it's not any kind of competition...
and I end up buying us ice cream at the base of
the mountain as a penalty for losing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess there's no need to rush things
during the break.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo, what are you gonna do after this?
choice_data_list: Probably head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...What about me?
choice_data_list: You can do whatever you want.
You can do whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Then I guess I'm completely free. Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan stares at me as if she's trying to hint
at something.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Buuut I guess there aren't many places open on
New Year's Day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, actually, I think I saw a little cafe that was
open on the way up. Maybe I'll go check it out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It'd be kinda weird to go alone, though. And it
sure would be nice to chat about the hike with the
person I went hiking with...
choice_data_list: ...Is is okay if I tag along?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Of course! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've actually been wanting to go for a while, but I
never had an excuse to make the trek up before.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think we should be able to take it easy there.
What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think we should be able to take it easy there.
What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We sit and rest until Curren Chan's satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, okay!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So basically, you just want me to shine more?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So basically, you just want me to shine more?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll have to go on a bunch of dates until I
figure out how! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, what do you expect?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, who says things like "I want you to shine"
these days? Not even the cheesiest rom-coms are
dropping lines like that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But if you want me to shine, you're gonna need to
keep me excited.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So make sure those dates are exciting, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So make sure those dates are exciting, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well... at the very least, it seems Curren Chan has
found a hint on how to make herself shine even
more.
